mapper.select:
select TBR.ID, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.CARGO_CODE, TBR.CARGO_NAME, TBR.INTE_FORE, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MDD.DICT_LABEL MEASUREMENT_UNIT_NAME1, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, TBR.START_DATE, TBR.END_DATE, CASE WHEN TBR.DATA_SOURCE = '1' THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME,DECODE(TBR.PROCESS_NAME,NULL,'','('||TBR.PROCESS_NAME||')')),':'),TO_CHAR(tbr.rate,'99999990.9999')) ELSE TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME || '-' || TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME || '-' || DECODE(TBR.CARGO_NAME,NULL,'',TBR.CARGO_NAME) || ':' || TO_CHAR(tbr.rate,'99999990.9999') END AS RATE_ITEM_AND_RATE, TBR.DATA_SOURCE from T_BUS_RATE TBR LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD ON MDD.DICT_TYPE = 'UNIT' AND TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 = MDD.DICT_VALUE LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON MFI.ITEM_CD = TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE
and TBR.DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource}
and TBR.STATUS='10' and TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') between TBR.START_DATE and TBR.END_DATE
and MFI.IS_MAIN_INCOME = 1
and MFI.IS_MAIN_INCOME = 0
order by TBR.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into T_MISC_BILLING (ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, BILL_DATE, VOYAGE_ID, RATE_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE, BILL_QUANTITY, BILL_QUANTITY2, AMOUNT_MONEY, TAX_AMOUNT, TRUST_ORDER_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, CUSTOMER_ID,COMPANY_ID,COMPANY_NAME,UNIT_CODE,UNIT_NAME, REMARK,PROCESS_CODE,PROCESS_NAME,CARGO_INFO_ID,CARGO_INFO_NAME, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE,TAXATION_INVOICE_NAME,OTHER_STATEMENT_ID,STATUS,VEHICLE_TRANSFER_FLAG) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{billDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{voyageId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{rateId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{shipVoyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{billQuantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{billQuantity2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{trustOrderId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{cargoInfoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{taxationInvoiceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otherStatementId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{status,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{vehicleTransferFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update T_MISC_BILLING set COMPANY_ID=#{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME= #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_CODE = #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_NAME = #{rateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE = #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BILL_DATE = #{billDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, VOYAGE_ID = #{voyageId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, RATE_ID = #{rateId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SHIP_VOYAGE = #{shipVoyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BILL_QUANTITY = #{billQuantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BILL_QUANTITY2 = #{billQuantity2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AMOUNT_MONEY = #{amountMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TRUST_ORDER_ID = #{trustOrderId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_INFO_NAME = #{cargoInfoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE = #{taxationInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE_NAME = #{taxationInvoiceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.select:
select a.ID,RATE_ITEM_CODE,RATE_NAME,RATE,TAX_RATE,BILL_DATE,RATE_ID, VOYAGE_ID,SHIP_VOYAGE,BILL_QUANTITY,BILL_QUANTITY2,AMOUNT_MONEY,TAX_AMOUNT,TRUST_ORDER_ID, a.CREATE_BY,a.CREATE_BY_NAME,a.CREATE_TIME,a.UPDATE_BY,a.UPDATE_TIME,a.UPDATE_BY_NAME,CUSTOMER_ID,b.CUSTOMER_NAME,a.STATUS, a.company_id,a.company_name,a.STATEMENT_ID,a.UNIT_CODE,a.UNIT_NAME,a.REMARK,PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, A.CARGO_INFO_ID,A.CARGO_INFO_NAME,A.TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE,A.TAXATION_INVOICE_NAME, MFI.ITEM_TYPE_CD FEE_TYPE, MFI.IS_MAIN_INCOME from T_MISC_BILLING a inner join T_BUS_CUSTOMER b on a.CUSTOMER_ID=b.id LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON MFI.ITEM_CD = a.RATE_ITEM_CODE
a.ID=#{id}
mapper.update: update T_MISC_BILLING set status=#{status}, STATEMENT_ID=#{statementId}, publish_by=#{loginUserId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, publish_time= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, publish_by_name= #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_BY = NULL, REJECT_BY_NAME = NULL, REJECT_TIME = NULL, REJECT_REASON = NULL where id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, RECEIPT_REMARK, TAX_INVOICE_CODE,TAX_INVOICE_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, IS_FINAL) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, (select SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM where ID = #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ), #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiptRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{taxInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{taxInvoiceName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", NUMBER2, RATE_ID, AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{number2, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select:
select TCSD.RATE_ITEM_CODE,TCSD.AMOUNT,MFI.ITEM_NM RATE_ITEM_NAME,CUSTOMER_NAME,TCS.STATEMENT_NO,TCSD.REMARK,TCSD."NUMBER",TCSD.RATE,TCSD.AMOUNT from T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD left join T_COST_STATEMENT TCS on TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID left join M_FEE_ITEM MFI on MFI.ITEM_CD = TCSD.RATE_ITEM_CODE where TYPE = '40' and TCSD.RATE_ITEM_CODE in ( 'MS00289', 'MS00290', 'MS00288', 'MS00274', 'MS00287', 'MS00308', 'MS00325', 'MS00309', 'MS00276', 'BO00100', 'BO00101', 'MS00260', 'MS00261' ) AND SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, BILL_DATE, RATE_ID, VOYAGE_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE, BILL_QUANTITY, BILL_QUANTITY2, AMOUNT_MONEY, TAX_AMOUNT, TRUST_ORDER_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, VEHICLE_TRANSFER_FLAG, STATUS FROM T_MISC_BILLING WHERE (VEHICLE_TRANSFER_FLAG IS NOT NULL AND VEHICLE_TRANSFER_FLAG = '1') AND OTHER_STATEMENT_ID = #{otherStatementId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT a.ID, a.RATE_ITEM_CODE, a.RATE_NAME, a.RATE, a.TAX_RATE, a.BILL_DATE, a.RATE_ID, a.VOYAGE_ID, a.BILL_QUANTITY, a.BILL_QUANTITY2, a.AMOUNT_MONEY, a.TAX_AMOUNT, a.TRUST_ORDER_ID, a.CREATE_BY, a.CREATE_BY_NAME, a.CREATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY, a.UPDATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY_NAME, a.CUSTOMER_ID, b.CUSTOMER_NAME, a.STATUS, a.company_id, a.company_name, a.STATEMENT_ID, a.UNIT_CODE, a.UNIT_NAME, a.REMARK, a.PROCESS_CODE, a.PROCESS_NAME, A.CARGO_INFO_ID, A.CARGO_INFO_NAME, A.TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE, A.TAXATION_INVOICE_NAME, MFI.ITEM_TYPE_CD FEE_TYPE, b.TIN, b.BANK, b.BANK_ACCOUNT, b.TELEPHONE_NUMBER, b.CONTACT, b.ADDRESS, b.CONTACT_NUMBER, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, a.CREATE_BY_NAME STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME REVIEW_BY_NAME, to_char(TCS.CREATE_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd') REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME , CASE WHEN a.SHIP_VOYAGE IS NULL and a.CARGO_INFO_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TDS.SHIP_NAME) || '_' || TO_CHAR(TDSI.VOYAGE) ELSE TO_CHAR(a.SHIP_VOYAGE) END SHIP_VOYAGE
from T_MISC_BILLING a INNER JOIN T_BUS_CUSTOMER b on a.CUSTOMER_ID=b.id LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON MFI.ITEM_CD = a.RATE_ITEM_CODE LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID = a.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID left join T_COST_STATEMENT TCS on a.STATEMENT_ID = TCS.ID
b.status = '10' and
a.ID IN
#{id}
select TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME,TBC.id,TBC.TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE,TBC.TAXATION_INVOICE from T_MISC_BILLING TMB left join T_BUS_CUSTOMER TBC on TMB.CUSTOMER_ID = TBC.ID where TMB.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
